mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window or forward returns are negative in >55% of rate-cut months.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.2 percentage points signals deteriorating labor market conditions that immediately compress corporate earnings expectations and drive negative S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: Forward 20-day returns remain positive in >60% of instances where UNRATE crosses the 0.2pp threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts indicates broad-based consumer demand strength that sustains corporate revenue growth and produces positive equity returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in RSAFS and HOUST fails to yield positive 60-day returns in >50% of observed quarters.

mechanism_narrative: Sharp contractions in the index of industrial production trigger immediate supply-side risk-off positioning that forces negative S&P 500 returns within one week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in >55% of months where INDPRO declines by more than 0.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Monthly CPI inflation exceeding 2.5% forces markets to price in aggressive central bank tightening, which compresses equity multiples and generates negative forward returns.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are positive in >60% of months where CPIAUCSL exceeds the 2.5% threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in total nonfarm payrolls expands aggregate consumption capacity and supports corporate earnings trajectories, driving positive S&P 500 returns over a three-month horizon.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are negative in >55% of months with positive PAYEMS growth.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising GDP growth and falling retail sales indicates inventory accumulation and weakening final demand, which triggers negative equity returns within one month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are positive in >60% of quarters where GDPC1 growth outpaces RSAFS growth.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production combined with stable inflation signals healthy capacity utilization that supports short-term risk appetite and generates positive S&P 500 returns within one week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in >55% of months where INDPRO rises while CPIAUCSL remains below 2.0%.
